programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Madison and Morgan try to help Nick find inner peace; a quest for revenge exacts its toll on the group.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Al's questioning uncovers some surprising truths about the group's past; John Dorie receives unexpected news.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: The arrival of a wounded visitor in John Dorie's life forces him to change his ways.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Leaphorn and Sgt. Jim Chee investigate the disappearance of a Navajo boy; Manuelito makes a sinister discovery while adjusting to life on the border patrol; an FBI agent comes to solve a case linked to Leaphorn's recent past.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Leaphorn and Chee find themselves on a manhunt after making a shocking discovery; Special Agent Washington questions Leaphorn about a person of interest; Manuelito puts her job on the line when she searches for answers at a local ranch.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: After a close call, Leaphorn and Chee follow the trail of a new suspect; the discovery of a body sends Special Agent Washington in a different direction; Manuelito puts a target on her back as she digs deeper into the mystery.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Morgan tries to help Alicia and the fractured group of survivors as a storm brews.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Alicia's forced to reckon with an agonizing past while seeking refuge from a storm.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Morgan's journey is derailed by some new acquaintances.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: June helps when Al's health deteriorates; Morgan searches for friends lost in the storm.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Strand and Dorie are marooned; Luciana aids a man in need; the group's efforts to help a stranger put everyone in danger.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Difficult decisions lead the group into uncertainty; Alicia delivers on a promise to Charlie.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group's hope falters as they seek a way out; Alicia and Charlie reunite with friends.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Morgan struggles to find the strength to help friends in dire need before it's too late.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Led by Morgan and Alicia, the group lands in uncharted territory in search of survivors to help; everything is not as it seems in this foreboding new land.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Morgan and Alicia meet a survivor and learn of a grave new walker threat; the mission is put to the test when one of their own goes missing; Strand makes contact.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: June and Dorie take shelter to hide from a threat, but a misunderstanding with a desperate survivor leads to trouble; Alicia and Morgan face a dangerous obstacle.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Charlie makes a friend, while Strand, Wendell, and Sarah's rescue mission hits a snag; Alicia, Luciana and Morgan struggle to fulfill their mission.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Althea chases a story with dogged determination, putting the mission, and her life in danger.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Facing impossible odds, Luciana and the group work together to tackle an impossible task while Morgan helps prevent disaster; an old friend presents Sarah, Charlie and Strand with a solution.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Strand and Charlie seek safety; Dorie helps Dwight on his quest; Morgan stays focused on the greater mission; Alicia refuses to give up.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Up against the clock, Morgan, Grace and Alicia work to buy time; Dorie and Dwight race against the elements; Sarah and Wendell get help from an unexpected source.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group, traveling in a convoy, doubles-down on their mission to help survivors; in an effort to encourage more survivors to reach out, Al, Luciana and Charlie document Morgan and the gang on a dangerous mission to help a reclusive survivor.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Morgan and Grace search an abandoned shopping mall for supplies and to fulfill a dying man's wish but the mission quickly turns to a fight for survival; Dwight's resolve to be a better man is tested.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: As Alicia struggles to find her new role in the convoy, she's drawn to mysterious artwork; a simple scouting trip is derailed when she and Strand are thrust into a conflict between desperate survivors; Morgan and Al hit a roadblock.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: In search of a permanent home for the convoy, Charlie is drawn to a synagogue where she encounters a rabbi surviving on his own; Sarah and Dwight face unexpected foes.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Logan's motives are revealed; Sarah, Dwight, and Luciana negotiate for the sake of the mission; Strand and Alicia race to the aid of a new survivor in a familiar place; a dangerous threat emerges.

programme.title: Life of Fire
programme.desc: When Pat's friends and fellow barbecue chefs, Bryan Furman and Dr. Howard Conyers, come to town, the guys dig deep into the tricks and traditions of one of Bryan's specialties: pork ribs.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Field To Fire
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern heads out on a hunt in South Carolina's low country, where thousands of wild hogs are leaving a wake of destruction as they ravage farm crops. After spending the day in a stand, he cooks wild hog two ways - a sour and spicy pork vindaloo with meet from the leg, and a whole hog slow roasted over the open fire.

programme.title: The Woodsman
programme.desc: Mike Strong and his family had one of their best deer seasons ever in 2023! Additionally, good friend Trever Friend knocks down a big Indiana buck. Watch it all go down now!

programme.title: HUNTER
programme.desc: Dave takes his daughter Allie to her first real deer camp and she makes the most out of the OK Youth season with a big wide 6 pointer.

programme.title: Buckmasters

programme.title: Guns and Gear
programme.desc: Faxon intros a new bolt action while Riton Optics displays new optics. Silencer Central goes light, MTM Cases follows suit and Black Hills Ammo continues with their solid ammunition.

programme.title: Shooting USA
programme.desc: The most popular division of USPSA competition is Carry Optics, and once again the national is a standalone single division contest. More than five hundred competitors have gathered at the Cardinal Shooting Center to find out who will be the National Champion. Then, it's the next in the series of new Colt ProTips to improve your shooting.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Fatbeard: Cartman hears of all the riches being plundered by the pirates in Somalia, so dons his eye patch and leads a motley crew off to Africa to get in on the act. (S13, E07)

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Dead Celebrities: The ghost of Michael Jackson refuses to accept his death, leaving the rest of the recently dead celebrities frustrated in purgatory and poor Ike having ghostly visits! (S13, E08)

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Butter's Bottom B***h: Oblivious to his actions, the little innocent Butters starts up 'The Kissing Company', and is soon the most notorious pimp around. Will undercover cops ruin his fun? (S13, E09)
programme.sub-title: Hotter than Summer: Butters' Bottom Bitch

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: W. T. F.: After seeing their first live WWE wrestling match the boys decide to form their own wrestling federation... and gain a huge redneck following! (S13, E10)

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Whale W****s: Kyle joins the crew of a reality documentary show who confront Japanese whalers, but finds their tactics leave a lot to be desired for and that war with Japan beckons! (S13, E11)

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The F Word: The boys confront a group of obnoxious bikers, but their methods force the townsfolk to redefine the meaning of a rather offensive word. Time to update the English Dictionary! (S13, E12)

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Dances With Smurfs: Cartman's vitriol finally gets a platform when he is chosen to be the school's morning announcer, and he unashamedly abuses his position. Power corrupts... (S13, E13)

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Pee: High levels of pee in the pool cause a disaster which ruins the day for the boys, Kyle especially. Eric's xenophobia pops up again when he believes himself "the last of his species". (S13, E14)

programme.title: South Park: Weight Gain 4000
programme.desc: Weight Gain 4000: Cartman wins a school essay competition by cheating and decides to buff up before receiving his award from Kathy Lee Gifford. Mr. Garrison and Mr. Hat plot to kill her! (S1, E02)

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Gets an Anal Probe
programme.desc: Cartman Gets An Anal Probe: Cartman dreams he has a close encounter with an alien. The other boys are convinced the dream was real, and that he has been the victim of an alien anal probe. (S1, E01)

programme.title: South Park: Volcano
programme.desc: Volcano: The boys go on a hunting trip with Stan's Uncle Jimbo to find the famous Scuzzlebutt. They are unaware that the mountain they are hunting on is a volcano on the verge of erupting! (S1, E03)

programme.title: South Park: An Elephant Makes Love to a Pig
programme.desc: An Elephant Makes Love To A Pig: Kyle calls in genetic engineer Dr. Mephisto to crossbreed his pet elephant and Cartman's pot-bellied pig in a bid to win a science competition. (S1, E05)
programme.sub-title: An Elephant Makes Love to a Pig

programme.title: South Park: Death
programme.desc: Death: Stan's ancient grandfather attempts to trick the boys into killing him. Meanwhile, the parents of South Park lobby a TV network to rid the airwaves of Terrance and Phillip. (S1, E06)

programme.title: South Park: Pink Eye
programme.desc: Pink Eye: It's Halloween and Kenny is killed by a falling space station and turned into a zombie by some embalming fluid contaminated with Worcester sauce. The zombie disease spreads. (S1, E07)

programme.title: South Park: Damien
programme.desc: Damien: The new kid in class persuades Jesus to do battle with his father, Satan, in the final battle of good versus evil. Cartman is livid to learn the bout clashes with his birthday. (S1, E10)

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The citizens of South Park wake up and find the internet is gone. When Randy hears there may still be some internet out in California, he packs up his family and heads west.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Randy steps forward with a solution to fix the desperate state of the economy.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Randy has a plan that will assure Stan a first place trophy in this year’s Pinewood Derby.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Stan takes action to stop the Japanese from killing the world’s whales and dolphins.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: When Kyle begs Stan to "friend" him, Stan gets sucked into Facebook.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: When Stan is sent to the school counselor because he’s holding on to an obscene number of useless possessions, he realizes that Mr. Mackey has a hoarding disorder too.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Randy’s obsession with the Food Network forces Sharon to explore a new interest of her own.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Just after Stan’s 10th birthday, his worldview starts to change and so do his friendships.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Cartman finds a unique way to cope with Asperger's Syndrome.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Cartman launches his own gem shopping channel.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Butters is the victim of an unlikely bully.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: A serious doping scandal shakes everyone's faith in a beloved icon. Everyone who once supported the fallen hero is now cutting off their symbolic yellow wristbands.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The boys use the game of "Minecraft" as a distraction to keep their parents from hurting each other.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Stan is addicted to the new Terrance and Phillip mobile game.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: A weekend trip to experience the finer points of camping, fishing and blowing animals to smithereens is threatened by an erupting volcano.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Grandpa's sole birthday wish is for Stan to take part in his assisted suicide. Meanwhile, Mrs. Broflovski has organized a protest against the boys' favorite TV show, "Terrance and Phillip."

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: When Sharon Marsh's Aunt Flo makes a monthly visit, she brings a mysterious pet fish for Stan.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: When the citizens of South Park start exploding randomly, the mayor enlists Stan's dad, the resident geologist, to find a solution to the problem.

programme.title: South Park

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: While the adults trapped at a time-share sales meeting, Stan is challenged by the best skier on the mountain.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: When a famous psychic fails to help him exorcise Kenny from his body, Cartman and Chef travel to the moors of Scotland, where Chef's mom tries a little of her voodoo magic on him.
programme.sub-title: The Biggest Douche in the Universe

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: When a 32-year-old man claiming to be Stan from the future shows up in South Park, young Stan is forced to come to terms with the loser he will become.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: A Mormon kid moves to South Park and it's up to Stan to kick his ass. But when Stan and his dad meet their new Mormon neighbors, they become fascinated with how genuinely nice they are.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: After the other boys explain to Cartman that pubes don't count unless you grow your own, Cartman realizes he's been tricked by the school bully, Scott Tenorman.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Cartman inherits a million dollars from his grandmother and fulfills his lifelong dream of owning his own amusement park: Cartmanland!

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Cartman plans to learn all of Butters' innermost secrets and then use them against him, by pretending to be Butters' new best friend, a robot named AWESOM-O.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: After sustaining a severe head injury, Cartman appears to have the power to see into the future. South Park detectives are quick to enlist his help in cracking unsolved murder cases.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Cartman is sure he's dead and Butters is sure that Eric Cartman's ghost is haunting him. Together they attempt to make amends to all the people Cartman has wronged over the years.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: After the sudden on-set of the disease Gingervitis, Cartman rallies all other ginger kids to rise up and assume their role as the master race.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Al Gore warns the school about the threat of Manbearpig.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: When Cartman's mom realizes she can't control her son anymore, she gets help from an expert. The "Dog Whisperer" may have what it takes but Eric Cartman's not going down without a fight.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: South Park Elementary faces strong opposition to the topic of evolution. Cartman's too busy to notice as he plans to propel himself into the future on the precise release date of the newest, hottest game console.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Eric Cartman has frozen himself in an attempt to make his three-week wait for a Nintendo Wii pass quickly. A freak accident landed him over 500 years in the future and now, he's stuck in a Godless world on the brink of war with no Nintendo Wii.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: When his "ultimate plan" to embarrass Butters backfires, Cartman struggles to keep his classmates from seeing a compromising photograph. Meanwhile, Butters is sent to a special camp where they "Pray the Gay Away."

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Cartman discovers the joys of having Tourette’s syndrome. Drunk with the power of saying whatever he wants without getting in trouble for it, he lines up national TV coverage to take advantage of his new life with no filters.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Cartman finds himself fighting for his life after a routine tonsillectomy goes wrong. When Kyle becomes infected with Cartman's ailment, the two won't stop for anything as they search for a cure that will reverse their otherwise certain mortality.

programme.desc: The Coon rises from the trash and takes his place as a lone vigilante who wipes out crime in the town of South Park.

programme.desc: Cartman dreams of being a NASCAR driver and he’s willing to do whatever it takes to make it happen.

programme.title: CBS Mornings

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: This newsmagazine investigates intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all aspects of the human experience. Over its long run, the show has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, driven the reopening -- and resolution -- of cold cases, and changed numerous lives. CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart. The program and its team have earned critical acclaim, including multiple Emmy, Peabody and Edward R. Murrow Awards.

programme.title: CBS Weekend News
programme.desc: Journalist Adriana Diaz anchors the Saturday edition of the CBS news program from Chicago, while Jericka Duncan takes the helm of the Sunday broadcast from New York. The two are the latest to fill the roll of weekend anchor, which was most recently represented by Reena Ninan and Eliane Quijano. The program offers the latest headlines, original reporting and in-depth pieces that add context and perspective to the world's events.

programme.title: 60 Minutes
programme.desc: The oldest and most-watched newsmagazine on television gets the real story on America's most prevalent issues. CBS News correspondents contribute segments to each hourlong episode. Topics range from hard news coverage to politics, lifestyle, pop culture, business, health, and science. The correspondents and contributors include Lesley Stahl, Scott Pelley, Anderson Cooper, Bill Whitaker, Sharyn Alfonsi, Jon Wertheim and Norah O'Donnell .

programme.title: CBS News Sunday Morning
programme.desc: The sparkling notes of a trumpet fanfare and the familiar logo of the sun alert viewers that it's time for CBS's Sunday morning staple. Journalist Jane Pauley helms the show, taking over hosting duties from Charles Osgood, who spent 22 years on the job. A morning talk show, this program airs at a different pace and focuses much of its attention on the performing arts. After a quick update of the day's news and national weather, correspondents offer longer-length segments on a variety of topics, from architecture to ballet to music to pop culture to politics.

programme.desc: The Seavers depend on Mike to win an annual bowling tournament, but he's too busy falling in love.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: After a fistfight with Ben's hockey coach, Jason must explain fighting isn't the way to succeed.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Jason learns Maggie may be having another baby and becomes ecstatic.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Jason and Maggie are displeased after being labeled unacceptable parents by P.T.A. stalwart June Hinckley.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A sibling rivalry in the Seaver household causes Ben to solicit money from the neighbors.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Mike is accused of cheating after getting the highest grade in class and must convince others he's innocent.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Thanks to their children, Jason and Maggie spend a whole day together for their anniversary.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Jason works to save Maggie's family home from sale, as Mike tries to rescue the Seaver house from destruction.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Maggie and Jason face career decisions that could affect each other, as Mike makes a philosophical discovery.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: After his Uncle Bob dies, Mike is haunted by nightmares of Bob.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Jason feels old and becomes depressed, Maggie finds the cure - a reunion with his old band.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: The first day back at school proves very educational for the family, as Ben learns to face fear.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Carol's friend Annie uses Carol to win Mike's affection.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Ben passes out a pornographic telephone number at school, he blames it on his best friend.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Mike becomes Employee of the Month and his parents buy him a car, but soon he must tell them he's been fired.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: While Carol does her best to alter her saintly reputation, Mike gets physical to protect his sister's honor.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Mike tricks his brother and sister again, the whole family decides to get even with a con of their own.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Jason and Maggie get into an argument over a mandatory dress code in the schools.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Ben invites a runaway kid home for Christmas, the Seavers learn about charity and the value of family.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: After being caught in a lie, Maggie grounds herself to teach Mike a lesson despite an impending Sinatra show.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Carol is given the chance to skip a grade in school, while Mike looks forward to a date with an older woman.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: The teacher's student assistant changes Mike's grade to an A so she can be his date on a ski trip.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: It's time for the Spring Formal, and Mike has his hands full, as three different girls want to go with him.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Carol has a slumber party, Ben and Mike can't resist scaring her friends.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: While Maggie and Jason spend the evening at home, Mike faces peer pressure and questions whether to use drugs.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Ben becomes interested in girls but doesn't understand them. He learns Mike and Jason are still learning, too.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.sub-title: Jimmy Durante Died For Your Sins
programme.desc: Jason and Maggie say "no" to a nose job, but Carol seems determined - until Mike makes a startling admission.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Maggie immerses herself in a school carnival, Ben feels ignored, and Jason almost drowns.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Ben researches his family's history, he finds evidence his mother and father have both been divorced.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: The experiences of a distraught, expectant father teach Mike the value of an education.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: It's Chore Day at the Seaver house, and Ben attempts to record the day's events for a school project.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Maggie gets a job offer from a newspaper editor with ulterior motives, Jason faces an ethical dilemma.

programme.title: The Divergent Series: Insurgent
programme.desc: Tris must confront her inner demons and fight against an alliance which threatens to tear her society apart.

programme.title: The Divergent Series: Allegiant
programme.desc: ALLEGIANT takes Tris and Four into a new world, far more dangerous than ever before.

programme.title: The Con Is On
programme.desc: A con-artist couple cook up a jewel-theft scam in L.A. to pay off a sexy, deadly gangster.

programme.title: Queenpins
programme.desc: A pair of housewives create a $40 million coupon scam.

programme.title: Hustlers
programme.desc: A crew of savvy former strip-club employees band together to turn the tables on their Wall Street clients.

programme.title: The Spy Who Dumped Me
programme.desc: Two friends become entangled in a conspiracy when one of them discovers the boyfriend who dumped her was a spy.

programme.title: Dublin Murders
programme.desc: A smart-suited homicide detective and his partner are dispatched to investigate a child’s murder.

programme.title: Dublin Murders
programme.desc: Rob and Cassie make a dark bargain to keep the secret and solve the cases.

programme.title: Dublin Murders
programme.desc: All of Knocknaree mourns as Katy Devlin is laid to rest. The pressures on Rob and Cassie mount.

programme.title: Dublin Murders
programme.desc: As Cassie struggles to make sense of Lexie’s life and death, we delve into her own difficult past.

programme.title: Dublin Murders
programme.desc: Cassie prepares for the most challenging investigation of her lifetime, and Rob hits rock bottom.

programme.title: Dublin Murders
programme.desc: When Cassie embeds herself in Whitethorn House, threats both known and unexpected haunt her every breath.

programme.title: Dublin Murders
programme.desc: Everything comes to a head as Cassie confronts Lexie’s killer and Rob has a breakthrough about Katy’s murder.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: Jackie deals with Fiona’s teacher’s concerns and suspicions about her busted lip and cast.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: Jackie wants to send Fiona to Immaculate. Kevin makes Jackie promise not to accept money from Dr. O’Hara.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: Jackie shows Dr. O’Hara a fake MRI to get an oxy prescription. Mrs. Akalitus rehires Eddie.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: After avoiding Eddie, O’Hara and a drug dealer, Jackie takes off early for a family vacation upstate.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: After a disastrous family vacation, Jackie returns to work for a day of reckoning.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: Jackie's marriage is strained, as is her relationship with O'Hara after the intervention.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: Eddie tells Jackie he can't keep lying to Kevin. The rift between Jackie and O'Hara softens.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: Much to Jackie's surprise Kevin's younger sister, Tunie, shows up in the girls' bedroom.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: Jackie's back in the swing of things. Zoey's working her first double shift and Jackie worries about her.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: Jackie is on edge after realizing the stash of pills she stole from Bill is quickly dwindling.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: As Jackie's supply of pills starts to dwindle, her strategies become more intense and secretive.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: Jackie soothes Grace's anxiety about the saint pageant. Kelly Slater continues to win over the All Saints crew.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: Jackie visits Bill at his diner only to find that he has no pills for her.

programme.title: Guilt by Association
programme.desc: Life abruptly changes for Susan when she discovers her perfect boyfriend is a drug dealer.

programme.title: Final Justice
programme.desc: A teacher kidnaps the attorney who successfully defended her gay brother's killer.

programme.title: Interrogation of Michael Crowe
programme.desc: A mother's daughter is brutally murdered in her own bedroom and her 14-year old son becomes the chief suspect.

programme.title: Beyond a Reasonable Doubt
programme.desc: Remake of the 1956 film noir film in which a writer's plan to expose a corrupt DA takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: The Royals
programme.sub-title: In My Heartthere Was a Kind of Fighting
programme.desc: When someone from Prince Robert’s past visits, Prince Liam and Princess Eleanor must face their own demons.

programme.title: The Royals
programme.sub-title: Our Wills and Fates Do So Contrary Run
programme.desc: Secrets are revealed as Prince Liam and Princess Eleanor investigate Prince Robert’s death.

programme.title: Grace and Frankie
programme.desc: Frankie and Grace receive surprise gifts from Babe that open new horizons for each of them.

programme.title: Grace and Frankie
programme.desc: Grace and Frankie try to get a loan to start their business. Frankie's art show is rife with family tensions.

programme.title: Grace and Frankie
programme.desc: Grace and Frankie pitch their business plan at a hip startup incubator. Grace fights with Jacob.

programme.title: Grace and Frankie
programme.desc: Grace and Frankie put together a focus group to test their vibrator prototype, but things go awry.

programme.title: Grace and Frankie
programme.desc: After they're robbed, Frankie is rattled, but Grace has a secret.

programme.title: Weeds
programme.desc: Nancy and Conrad make their first sale to Snoop Dogg, who writes a song about their high-quality product.

programme.title: Weeds
programme.desc: Peter is embarrassed when his bust of Heylia goes awry thanks to Nancy's warning.

programme.title: Weeds
programme.sub-title: Mile Deep and a Foot Wide
programme.desc: After a near bust by the DEA, Heylia puts serious pressure on Nancy to make things right.

programme.title: Weeds
programme.desc: Having eavesdropped on Nancy and Conrad's phone conversation, Peter stops playing nice.

programme.title: Weeds
programme.desc: Nancy's big day is marred by the disappearance of Silas, Shane's graduation speech, and Celia's madness.

programme.title: The Ropers
programme.desc: The clock Stanley gives Helen for their anniversary turns out to be stolen from Brookes' apartment.

programme.title: The Ropers
programme.desc: On the day that Helen is making dinner to impress her rich sister, Ethel, the utilities are cut off because Stanley forgot to pay the bills. He goes to great lengths to hide his mistake.

programme.title: Too Close For Comfort
programme.desc: The Rushes' new piano gets stuck in the stairway just as Muriel goes into labor, leaving Henry and Monroe to devise a way to get her out of the second floor and to the hospital.

programme.title: Too Close For Comfort
programme.desc: Muriel's defense of Henry to her disapproving mother creates a rift which Henry has to heal.

programme.title: Too Close For Comfort
programme.desc: Henry disowns Sara when she pursues a job on a talk show instead of her college degree.

programme.title: Too Close For Comfort
programme.sub-title: A Policeman's Wife is not a Happy One
programme.desc: Brad chooses a police street beat over a desk job, then calls off his wedding to spare Jackie the life of a cop's wife.

programme.title: Too Close For Comfort
programme.desc: After a week of Muriel's false labor pains, Henry reluctantly goes to a meeting with his boss, leaving Monroe in charge. First of two parts.

programme.title: Too Close For Comfort
programme.desc: Henry gains a new son but loses his job when he misses his appointment with Wainwright to be with Muriel in the delivery room. Part 2 of 2.

programme.title: Too Close For Comfort
programme.desc: Henry threatens to move out when Muriel's mother Iris comes to visit her new grandson and decides to stay.

programme.title: Too Close For Comfort
programme.sub-title: Who Was That Baby I Saw You With?
programme.desc: Muriel's photo session of babies with Cosmic Cow results in Andrew being taken by a slightly senile grandmother.

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing - Bishop Creek Fishing
programme.desc: Growing up in Southern California, there’s a special spot my dad would always take us: the Eastern Sierras. If you love the outdoors, trout fishing, and pure beauty, the Sierras have it all. We especially enjoy venturing up in the fall when the weather changes, the fall colors start popping, and the fishing is phenomenal. The Sierras offer endless options for camping, hiking, and fishing, and that’s exactly what we’re doing for the next couple of weeks. Join us as we explore some creek fishing around Park's Resort, lake fishing at South and Sabrina Lake, and then head into the backcountry for an epic day hike. Don’t miss out on this adventure through one of the most picturesque and diverse regions of California!

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing - Exploring the Sierras: South Lake Trout Fishing
programme.desc: Good morning, fishermen from the Eastern Sierras! It's trout time in God's country. Last week, Ryan, Dixie, and I embarked on a six-hour road trip to Bishop, California, with a short 45-minute drive up the mountain to Parcher's Resort. After settling into our comfortable cabin, we kicked off our adventure with some creek fishing. Today on Stoked on Fishing, we're headed to South Lake to fish with Jared, owner and operator of Parcher's Resort and Sierra Slammer Trout Baits. We'll hop on one of his pontoon boats for a three-hour afternoon session.

programme.desc: In Episode 3, we navigate the serene waters of the Ivanhoe River, embracing the beauty of spring as we target post-spawn walleye. With rods in hand, we explore the river's productive fishing spots, uncovering the best techniques and tips for a successful catch in this transitional season. From scenic backdrops to thrilling strikes, this episode captures the essence of spring fishing at its finest.

programme.title: Hook 'n Look — Deeper Aspirations
programme.desc: After experiencing a productive lipless crankbait pattern, Kim and his guest, Minnesota Outdoor Writer, Cory Schmidt expand their efforts deeper and discover a mega school of better-quality smallmouth and largemouth bass. Strike King’s new “Magnum” Dream Shot Worm is the featured presentation and an eye-opening dive segment tops off this informative and captivating episode.

programme.title: FishON! - Trailblazing to Trophy Walleye: Polaris Ranger Adventure
programme.desc: Join the FishON! TV crew as we tackle rugged Northern Ontario terrain with our Polaris Ranger equipped with a custom boat rack. This remote expedition takes us deep into the wilderness to an untouched lake known for its walleye bounty. From the adrenaline of the journey to the thrill of the catch, this episode is packed with adventure, stunning scenery, and fishing tips you won’t want to miss!

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: In this episode the DCD crew heads to the lesser-known but highly productive Red River in Western Louisiana. Despite a slow start to the season, the Red River provides some of the best hunting yet. With mixed bags of woodies, greenheads, and teal. Not to mention a handful of bonus squirrels and wild mushrooms. Shoot straight and come hungry.

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: When overnight temps go low and the tides go lower, it forces Redfish to move. Justin & Travis break out a new micro skiff to see how low they can go to ambush shifting redfish on the flats.

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: It’s playtime for Travis & Justin when offshore guide Josh Sauls shares a secret honey hole and his fishing ancestry. Then luck shines when the guys find another sweet spot on the way back.

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: The irresistibly serene gulf waters off Panama City Beach lure Justin into taking Capt. Ed Zyak out to see what's biting. It quickly turns into a study session and a lesson. Patience + perseverance = success.

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: Justin has spent a lifetime buying, selling and rigging boats to fit his angling needs. Learn what you need to ask yourself before shopping for the perfect boat and what to look for at the dealership.

programme.title: FinQuest
programme.desc: In Episode 4 of FinQuest, Ryan Miller explores Jupiter’s Inner Coastal Waterway, blending fishing, paddleboarding, and community engagement. With the help of Matthew from Jupiter Live Bait, Ryan showcases bait preparation techniques before catching snook in the vibrant ICW. He highlights Jupiter's community spirit by joining a local clean-up initiative with Jeremy from Blue Line Paddleboards. The episode features paddleboarding adventures with Ryan’s family, connecting with nature and marine life, and ends with a conservation message about preserving Jupiter’s pristine environment.

programme.title: FinQuest
programme.desc: In Episode 5 of FinQuest, Ryan Miller dives into the vibrant world of offshore fishing off the coast of Palm Beach County. Joined by Cabo Mike, they showcase expert bait techniques and strategies, reeling in a variety of catches, including bonita and a stunning mahi mahi. The duo shares insights into their fishing setup, explains the use of daisy chains, and celebrates their exciting day at sea. With breathtaking views of the ocean and a colorful array of fish, Ryan’s passion for saltwater fishing shines through. The episode wraps up with a reflection on the beauty and bounty of Palm Beach County waters.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: The story of Team Winchester shooters Zach Kienbaum and Desirae Edmunds is told. Zach and Desi discuss how they got started in the shooting sports and how important coaching has become to both of them. They also talk shooting tips. Theo Ribbs breaks down the shotgun sports while Chris Keefer, Casey Keefer, Paul Sawyer, Nikki Boxler and Gabe Adair have a friendly sporting clays competition.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: The Pacific Northwest does not have the easiest conditions to train in for this shooting sports team. For this Seattle-based SST Ravens, this skeet and trap team finds that the challenging weather they train in comes in handy when competing. Also: Competition shooting tips form pro shooter Theo Ribbs.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Every spring brings a new opportunity to take a step forward & recall the memories of seasons past. World War II Veteran and retired Judge Arden Hill has spent most of his life chasing turkeys in the hills of Tennessee. Now in his 90’s, Arden doesn’t let age stand in the way of his love for spring turkey hunting. Also: patterning turkey shotguns and hunting spring gobblers.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Winchester introduces the Shoot United brand aimed at offering useful information and tips to the millions of new shooters entering the shooting sports. New York native and Midland University competitive shotgun shooter Amy Cawley and her journey as a student-athlete is followed. Also: Theo Ribbs gives shooting tips for competition and Foster Bartholow reviews Winchester AA Diamond Grade.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: DIRT - "Getting a Crash Course in Bull Riding, Tex-Mex Cuisine & the Spirit of Texas - DIRT Texas"
programme.desc: Anyone can be a cowboy—that’s the biggest thing the DIRT crew learned in Texas. From riding bulls in Fort Worth to off-roading in the Chihuahuan desert to forging their own path across this vast state with the help of local trailblazers Liz and Lou Lambert. Lucky for us, they even stopped by Huckberry’s own backyard in Austin for a quick ruck and a couple games of chicken sh*t bingo. When the dust finally settled, we fired up the barbecue for our beefiest feast yet and raised our ranch waters high to 10 DIRT episodes in the can.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: DIRT - "The ULTIMATE Ireland Food Road Trip - Surfing, Golfing & Delicious Eats"
programme.desc: For DIRT’s first trip across the pond, host Josh Rosen dove head first into Ireland. From long-held traditions to the modern-day artisanal movement, he unearthed the multicultural goldmine between the highlands and the Wild Atlantic Way—with stops for surfing, a seaweed bath, and a couple holes of golf spectated by free-range goats, of course. Foraged cocktails? Fresh crabs from Galway Bay? It’s all on the table in this episode rooted in community, homegrown ingredients, and the damn good people who bring it all together. Subscribe to our YouTube channel to catch up on all of DIRT’s past adventures.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: DIRT - "Can You Surf & Eat Like a Local in Minnesota? Wild Foraging & Delicious Local Eats"
programme.desc: In Episode 3, Josh starts off in the Twin Cities where he meets up with Yia Vang, an award-winning Hmong chef and restaurant owner, bringing his family’s traditions and flavors to the American Midwest. As Josh heads up north to Duluth and the boundary waters, he’ll meet plenty of farmers and foragers—harvesting mushrooms, wild rice, and catching a few fish (and waves) along the way. It all wraps up with an epic feast hosted by Yia back in the cities.

programme.title: Fishing With Jay
programme.desc: READY TO ROLL!!…almost - We have our bus. We have our boat. And we have Mr. J. Rockfish on board to steer the ship. But before we can hit the road, we’ve got some work to do. - The bus…it needs a new motor and maybe some other stuff (TBD) that’s been hiding under 40 years of crust and crud… - The boat, it needs some fiberglass work. A casting platform and floor would be cool…maybe a paint job. - And Jay, well his gear is pretty shot, and his normally ripped physique has been obscured under some COVID poundage he acquired over the past year or so…And maybe a pedicure and haircut are in order before stepping in front of the camera… - First, the bus. A little interior decorating perhaps. - The 14 seats built for preschoolers don’t quite accommodate over-sized fishing dudes. And, come to find out, there are no rod racks. No bar. No stereo. No beds. No fly-tying stations. And no beer fridge. How did those kids survive? - Time to gut this thing…Check it out! #fishingwithjay.

programme.title: Fishing With Jay
programme.sub-title: "Fly Fishing For Snook in Indian River Lagoon"
programme.desc: With Tampa Bay suffering from a tragic red tide, Court left his home waters to fish with Jay and Casey in our backyard, the flats of Indian River and Mosquito Lagoon.

programme.title: Life on the Line
programme.desc: World record fly fisherman Nathaniel Linville shares his journey from troubled youth and addiction to redemption through fly fishing. After hitting rock bottom, he finds purpose in sobriety and relentless dedication, ultimately rising to the top as a world-record permit angler in the Florida Keys.

programme.title: Local Lines
programme.desc: Brandon fishes with Robbie Crosnoe On Lake Henderson. These longtime buddies are dialed into the lake like no one else.

programme.title: The Direction
programme.desc: The Direction stays close to home, and gets the privilege of fishing a beautiful private lake nestled into the hills of Kentucky. Mark’s special guest this week is Gabe Glasscock of Glasscock Log and Lumber. Gabe’s family run business ships lumber worldwide; in fact, they’re one of the largest producers of aromatic red cedar in the U.S.

programme.title: Operation Healing Heroes
programme.desc: U.S. Navy veteran John Fleming recounts the life altering effects of his traumatic brain injury which cost him his rank.

programme.title: The Cast
programme.desc: Trenton goes down North Carolina to learn the family secrets of the Forehand family. Ben Forehand is a guitarist for Christian Contemporary artist Pat Barret. programme.title: The Raven Project

programme.sub-title: "North American Deer Slam - Mexican Texanus Whitetail"
programme.desc: Continuing on with his quest for The North America Deer Slam, Mark Peterson packs his Gunwerks Nexus 300 PRC rifle for a hunt in Mexico targeting the elusive Mexican Texanus Whitetail from elevated blinds. The outfitter here has done an amazing job managing the deer numbers and age groups to grow giant whitetails. Mark is anticipating the pre-rut will get these big bucks moving.

programme.title: The Journey Within

programme.title: HuntStand Presents
programme.sub-title: "Second Chance - Hunting the November Rut in Ohio"
programme.desc: Hunting has a way of grounding us, reminding us of what truly matters: shared moments and unforgettable memories. Chance and Ashleigh Eckert are on their first out-of-state hunt in the rolling hills of Ohio. After overcoming a life-changing kidney transplant, their story is one of faith, love, and resilience. While the goal was a big buck, the true reward was the time spent together and the lessons learned along the way. Because hunting is about so much more than the harvest — it’s about the journey.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.sub-title: "Opening Week in Mississippi started off with a BANG!!"
programme.desc: Opening day in Mississippi has arrived and Slade is taking full advantage of it! With the weather not cooperating Slade and Zeb stumble into a turkey hunt they won't soon forget. Two days later, the hot streak continues with Slade connecting on another turkey on an 83 acre property he has for sale! Also, Slade gives some tips and his ideas on small acreage hunting, and how it can be just as lucrative as big tracks of land!

programme.title: Behind The Draw
programme.sub-title: "Chasing Buddy! Mike's Last Day Miracle On A BIG Colorado Buck!"
programme.desc: When you think of hunting Colorado, Big Whitetails might not necessarily come to mind. However, Mike is very familiar with Eastern Colorado and the whitetails here specifically. He has hunted with his friends that run this ranch for years now and helped them manage this special piece of land. There is an absolutely, incredible age class of deer that live here with some of the most unique hunting Colorado has to offer. In this particular story Mike takes his bow-hunt down to the final day of his hunt while he is after a certain buck they've nicknamed "Buddy".

programme.title: The Green Way Outdoors
programme.desc: Kyle and Jeff embark on a 20-day mission into the Everglades to find the invasive pythons that are plaguing the ecosystem. These apex predators have eliminated more than 90% of fur-bearing animals in their new home. Can they turn the tide, or is the Everglades already lost?

programme.title: The Green Way Outdoors
programme.desc: Kyle and Jeff get bit by catfish in Southern Oklahoma with YouTuber Nate Williams of Adrenaline Rush Adventures while using the most primitive fishing tactic - hand fishing. programme.title: Louisiana Catch and Cook

Jump in as we finish our catch and head down to the BEAUTIFUL Restaurant Des Families for dinner on the bayou. Back at Elsa's Place, we keep the feast going and enjoy the camaraderie at our camp. Just a quick drive down from New Orleans Airport. Don't miss out on the fun. Book your trip today at www.LouisianaCharterFishing.com!

programme.title: Louisiana Catch and Cook
programme.desc: In this episode, Chef Jay Ducote brings along a very special fishing buddy, his dad, for our first-ever Catch & Cook freshwater adventure! We’re heading to the legendary Toledo Bend, famous for its sac-a-lait (Cajun for crappie) and ranked among the top bass lakes in the U.S. It’s a bucket-list stop for anglers everywhere, but trust us, the story doesn’t end with the fish. - Steeped in Spanish, French, and Native American roots dating back to the Louisiana Purchase, this region serves up culture and flavor as rich as its fishing. We’ll be staying at Wildwood Resort, hitting the water with Captain Matt Loetscher of Living The Dream Guide Service, and capping off the day with spectacular lake views from their breezy lakeside bar. - Hook, line, and sinker — you don’t want to miss this one! - Ready to go catchin’ with one of Louisiana’s best captains? Visit www.LouisianaCharterFishing.com to check availability or book your trip today!

programme.title: TRP
programme.desc: Today we’re talking with Nick Haddad about his innovative fishing conservation initiative, "Return 'Em Right," focused on boosting the survival rates of reef fish caught and released in the Gulf of Mexico. Teaming up with Florida Sea Grant, University of Florida, Gulf States Marine Fisheries Commission, NOAA, and a diverse coalition of partners, the project delivers training, equipment, and research funding to tackle depredation and release mortality issues. Moreover, it evaluates the efficacy of descending devices, ultimately promoting improved fish survival, a more robust fishery, and enriched angling experiences across the Gulf of Mexico. - This podcast is presented by Black Rifle Coffee - Use code BLASTOFF25 for 25% off - Salt Strong Insiders Club: https://bit.ly/RowlandMembership - LMNT Electrolytes Special Offer: http://DrinkLMNT.com/TomRowland - If you have questions or suggestions for the show you can text Tom at 1 305-930-7346 - This episode has been brought to you by Waypoint TV. programme.title: The Reel American Road Trip

programme.desc: Danny is joined by Ryan Sheffield for some fishing on Cape San Blas. They meet up with Mark Moore to go fishing for Reds and Trout. Later, they cook up the catch.

programme.title: The Reel American Road Trip
programme.sub-title: "Blue line fishing in Helen Georgia with Tad Murdock"
programme.desc: Danny is joined by John McCune for blue line fishing with Tad Murdock. Later they explore Helen Georgia during Oktoberfest.

programme.title: The Reel American Road Trip

programme.desc: Danny has got the gang back together. Ryan Sheffield and John McCune meet us in Helen Georgia for Oktoberfest and trout fishing on private waters.

programme.title: Realtree Road Trips
programme.desc: October is here. We start out in Nebraska, head to Kansas and end up in Georgia. Many people have been impacted by the recent hurricanes. To help those in need we are hunting does and will donate as much venison as we possibly can to the victims.

programme.title: Realtree Road Trips
programme.sub-title: Road Trips - "Bow Hunting Giant Georgia Bucks- "
programme.desc: Realtree's Tyler Jordan and Michael Pitts hunt the tail end of the rut in Georgia. The bucks are still chasing the remaining does in heat as the weather cools off in the south.

programme.title: Realtree Road Trips
programme.sub-title: Road Trips - "The Story of Stomper Jr.- "
programme.desc: After 3 years, Tyler kills “Stomper,Jr.” and he just might be the new Louisiana state record buck. We scored him at 203" gross and 193" net typical. We thoroughly enjoyed chasing this magnificent animal in Louisiana with our good buddies Drew Keith and Cole Cooper. Hope you enjoy watching this video just as much as we enjoyed putting it together!

programme.title: Realtree Road Trips
programme.desc: Join Bryan Brown, Rigsby Stewart, and Chase Herndon along with Lee Ellis on our annual opening week hunt in Northern Nebraska. Big Bucks were spotted and a tag was punched on an unexpected buck on opening day!

programme.title: The Cast
programme.desc: Trenton and Rex link up with Gehrig Dieter and Anthony Sherman from the Kansas City Chiefs. While filling the boat with crappie they got to learn about the guys and their careers in the NFL.

programme.title: The Cast
programme.desc: The Southards are heads to Table Rock for the annual family vacation. Receding water poses a challenge but there’s no lack of fish or laughs at the lake!

programme.title: Beyond The Surface
programme.desc: Today, Capt. Danny is joined by his son Dillan for a plug-filled day in their local waters of Cedar Key, FL!

programme.title: Beyond The Surface
programme.desc: Today, Capt. Danny is in Stuart, FL. Joined by 16-year-old angler, Denton Potter. The two are targeting the local bridge dwelling giants, while going “Beyond The Surface” into Denton’s story.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Nikki Boxler’s life in Update New York on her family farm raising cattle and producing maple syrup is a few thousand miles from the hills of New Mexico. We’ll take a look into Nikki’s life back home and then follow along as she visits the small town of Quemado and its bustling population of 228, while she pursues bugling elk with her favorite Winchester in hand. We’ll also head to Missouri and Texas to chase whitetails with Chris Keefer and Paul Sawyer.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: We set out to tell the tale of Marion - and his legendary Mack’s Prairie Wings, smack dab in the middle of the world famous Stuttgart, Arkansas - the land of ducks and rice. Get an inside look at a man that many consider to be larger than life, from those that knew him best, like his cousin and fellow hell raiser, Bud McCollum. We’ll even hear a story or two from Milton Stovesand, an 81 year old former waterfowl guide and Mack’s employee who actually guided John Olin a time or two, and ran the timber holes with Marion. It’s timber holes and tall tales. It’s cups of coffee and cupped up wings. It’s partners in business, and partners in potholes and it’s pure Arkansas...just like Marion.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Melissa Bachman has made her name over the last two decades as one of the most dedicated hunters and producers in the outdoor industry. In this episode we’ll tag along with Melissa while she chases big game around the world with her Winchester in hand. First we’ll head to Colorado as Melissa spot and stalks giant mule deer, then we’ll head across the pond to New Zealand to chase mountain ibex and tar, then head back to the states for Montana whitetail at ground level.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Shotgun sports are experiencing unprecedented growth, with competitions across the country gaining popularity as enthusiasts vie to be the best shooters in the world. Every summer, the Amateur Trapshooting Association hosts The Grand American in Sparta, Illinois. This year marks the 125th Anniversary for the largest trap shooting competition in the world. We’ll talk with the people who make this tournament run behind the scenes and explore what makes this tournament such a special event. We’ll also look at the rich history of The Grand. On-site we’ll chat with the curator of the Trapshooting Hall of Fame and look at some of the incredible historical pieces on display in the museum. Additionally, we’ll learn about White Flyer and how the clay manufacturer has made important innovations for the shotgun sports.
Follow Team200’s crew of traditional archers as they chase big - whitetails in Canada!

programme.sub-title: Road Trips - "A MONARCH Of A Buck - Bowhunting Louisiana - Realtree Road Trips"
programme.desc: Tyler Jordan is hunting a true giant at one of his favorite places to hunt in the Southeast. Tyler Jordan and Ben McDonald decide to try their luck bowhunting at Honeybrake for a couple true southern ghosts.

programme.title: Road to the Unthinkable
programme.desc: The Quest for the Motorcycle Triple Backflip (narrated by Johnny Knoxville)òis the story about the attempt for the most dangerous trick in the history of action sports. The Road to the Unthinkable recounts the progression of the motorcycle backflip.ò The film tells the story of the very first competitive backflip by Carey Hart in 2000, Travis Pastrana landing his iconic double backflip at the X Games six years later, and finally the legendary quest of three men (Travis Pastrana, Thomas Pags, and Josh Sheehan) to ride away from worldís first motorcycle triple backflipîa feat thought to be totally impossible.ò This is the story of the dramatic evolution of what is possible and the athletes who risk life and limb to redefine the boundaries of human performance. òòA full decade and a half after the first motorcycle backflip was attempted, the death-defying triple backflip was finally within reach. THE ROAD TO THE UNTHINKABLE follows this quest as three FMX riders and close friends push each other to the edge and back and try to write their names in the history books.ò ò.

programme.title: 1st Strike
programme.desc: Juan, a teenager from a gang-controlled neighborhood, is falsely accused of a crime. His uncle, a former gang leader-- now an actor -- is killed trying to help him, and his sister turns to Alan, a war-weary defense attorney, to help him avoid prison.

programme.title: Meet Bill
programme.desc: A mild-mannered bank executive (Aaron Eckhart) mentors a teenage con artist and tries to make a career change as a doughnut merchant.

programme.title: Slip and Fall
programme.desc: Danny has to come up with a way to pay for law school and rent.

programme.title: Ass Backwards
programme.desc: Mishaps and calamities befall two best friends (June Diane Raphael, Casey Wilson) who are on their way back to their hometown for a children's beauty-pageant reunion.

programme.title: The Trouble With Bliss
programme.desc: An emotionally inert 35-year-old (Michael C. Hall) finds his life opening up when he begins a relationship with a former classmate's 18-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Oxy Morons
programme.desc: Jason and Danny are forever haunted by the murder of their bank robber father, which left their family desolate. When the boys' mother comes home with a new prescription painkiller, the two are introduced to a tiny life-changing pill.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cooks Tour A Mystical World
Anthony Bourdain A Cooks Tour Childhood Flavors
Anthony Bourdain A Cooks Tour Elements of a Great Bar
Living and Dying
programme.desc: Two killers hijack a trio of robbers' plans, and hold up a bank themselves. Under lockdown by the police, the robbers must become heroes and save the day before the killers strike.

programme.title: Night Of The Living Dead
programme.desc: The radiation from a fallen satellite causes the recently deceased to rise from the grave and seek the living to use as food.

programme.title: Death Ship
programme.desc: Survivors of a tragic shipping collision are rescued by a mysterious black ship which appears out of the fog. Little do they realise that the ship is a Nazi torture ship which has sailed the seas for years, luring unsuspecting sailors.

programme.title: 2B Perfectly Honest
programme.desc: Two men (Adam Trese, Andrew McCarthy) have different ways of coping with the untimely failure of their Internet business.

programme.title: McLintock
programme.desc: Aging rancher George Washington McLintock (John Wayne), a wealthy self-made man, is forced to deal with numerous personal and professional problems. Seemingly everyone wants a piece of his enormous farmstead, including high-ranking government men, McLintock's own sons and nearby Native Americans.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cooks Tour Singapore New York in Twenty Years
Anthony Bourdain A Cooks Tour San Sebastian A Food Lovers Town
Anthony Bourdain A Cooks Tour Puebla Where the Good Cooks Are From
Anthony Bourdain A Cooks Tour Cod Crazy
Anthony Bourdain A Cooks Tour Elements of a Great Bar
